prompt: Cinematic automotive billboard poster, [CAR MODEL + VARIANT] in [PAINT COLOR + FINISH], parked center-frame, dominant stance, low angle / front three-quarter / elevated SUV angle, ultra controlled composition. Environment designed to match brand mood: [ENVIRONMENT DESCRIPTION], seamlessly fading into deep gradient background, zero clutter. Ground surface: [SURFACE TYPE] with subtle realistic reflections, controlled diffusion, no noise. Atmosphere: [FOG / HAZE / PARTICLES — optional but controlled], only at ground level for depth. Top right corner: [BRAND LOGO DESCRIPTION], small and elegant, paired with minimal uppercase text "[YOUR SIGNATURE]" aligned cleanly. Render quality: hyper-detailed photorealism, ultra sharp reflections, realistic paint microtexture, cinematic color grade matching environment. Composition: perfectly balanced, symmetrical, professional automotive advertising layout. Format: 1:1 square, ultra high resolution, print-ready billboard finish.
